description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the quay.io/pypa/manylinux1_x86_64 Docker image and defines a single stage called deploy. Add a global before_script that exports PATH=/opt/python/cp35-cp35m/bin:$PATH and runs pip install --editable . Define a deploy job named deploy that runs only on tag pushes (only: tags) and is assigned to the deploy stage. In the deploy job execute the exact commands: pip install -U twine setuptools wheel, then python setup.py bdist_wheel, then twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASS dist/* to publish the built wheel to PyPI.
